mnemonics: Bitcoin Brought Forth Decentralized Ledgers (BBFDL) - Represents the key innovation: a decentralized, trustless ledger system first realized with Bitcoin.
keyPoints: The core concept of a cryptographically secured chain of blocks was first described by Stuart Haber and W. Scott Stornetta in 1991.
Satoshi Nakamoto's 2008 whitepaper 'Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System' solved the double-spending problem without a central authority, creating the first blockchain.
The genesis block (Block 0) of the Bitcoin network was mined by Nakamoto in January 2009, marking the practical beginning of blockchain technology.
commonMistakes: Believing blockchain and Bitcoin are the same thing (Blockchain is the technology; Bitcoin is its first application).
Thinking blockchain technology did not exist before 2008 (the conceptual foundations were laid in the early 1990s).
